title: JBCスプリントの後に・ライバル！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Haru Urara takes first place in a genuine G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Coupled with the cheers of support from the
stands, this victory feels like she has truly earned
her spot in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On her way back home, she's spotted by Special
Week and Seiun Sky, who heap praise on her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara, realizing they're also going to enter
the Arima Kinen, proclaims them her rivals and
vows to beat them.
